_comment: Shadow experiment registry. Edited automatically by scripts/promote_experiment.py during a flip — do not hand-edit unless you know the promotion script is not running. Each top-level key (eye_state, etc.) is a classifier stage; the value is a list of shadows to run for that stage. See scripts/lib/experiments.py for the loader and the EyeStateShadowExperiment class docstring for the per-entry schema.
